sections.title: Overview
sections.body_md: Role recommendations and work-environment guidance for ENFJ profiles. This profile tends to do best when goals are explicit, feedback is available, and growth loops stay visible.

items.title: Delayed feedback loops causing slower iteration

sections.title: Growth summary
sections.body_md: High-autonomy role scope, clear success metrics, and consistent feedback cadence.

sections.title: Relationships summary
sections.body_md: You usually build trust through direct dialogue, shared activity, and fast feedback. You tend to connect more deeply with people who enjoy discussing patterns, future possibilities, and meaning. In conflict you often default to harmony and emotional tone, so it helps to make your principles explicit. In close relationships and teamwork, you usually prefer clarity, commitment, and predictable pace.

sections.title: Career summary
sections.body_md: You usually perform best in high-autonomy role scope, clear success metrics, and consistent feedback cadence. Prioritize options like Lawyer, Teacher, Machine Learning Engineer.

payload_json.work_env: High-autonomy role scope, clear success metrics, and consistent feedback cadence.
